title: Almond Misto
description: A citrusy, silky Croatian dish featuring almond flour and dumplings, perfect for a monsoon season.
instructions: Mix almond flour, all-purpose flour, baking powder, sesame seeds, salt, and citrus zest in a large bowl.
In another bowl, whisk together egg whites until stiff peaks form. Add yogurt and milk gradually while mixing continuously until smooth.
Gradually fold the wet ingredients into dry ingredients by thirds to avoid overmixing.
Divide dough into 12 balls. Roll each ball between your palms or between sheets of parchment paper to flatten into 4-inch circles.
Gently press a cherry or small piece of fruit (optional) in center of each flattened circle for decoration.
Place almond mists on ungreased baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown. Allow to cool before serving.
Serving suggestion: Enjoy Almond Misto with a drizzle of honey or a sprinkle of powdered sugar.
